# @formosaic/chakra

> Chakra UI v3 field components for @formosaic/core. 13 field types using Chakra components with semantic HTML fallbacks where needed.

- Docs: [README](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/tree/main/packages/chakra/README.md)
- Agent instructions: [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/tree/main/packages/chakra/AGENTS.md)
- npm: [@formosaic/chakra](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@formosaic/chakra)
- License: MIT
- Peer dependencies: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-hook-form`, `@formosaic/core`, `@chakra-ui/react`

## API Surface

### Registry
- `createChakraFieldRegistry()` -- Creates the default Chakra UI field registry (`Record<string, React.JSX.Element>`) for use with `InjectedFieldProvider`

### Editable Field Components (12)
- `Textbox` -- Chakra `Input`
- `Number` -- Chakra `Input` (`type="number"`)
- `Toggle` -- Semantic `<input type="checkbox" role="switch">` (HTML fallback)
- `Dropdown` -- Chakra `NativeSelect`
- `SimpleDropdown` -- Chakra `NativeSelect` for string arrays
- `MultiSelect` -- Semantic `<select multiple>` (HTML fallback)
- `DateControl` -- Chakra `Input` (`type="date"`)
- `Slider` -- Semantic `<input type="range">` (HTML fallback)
- `RadioGroup` -- Semantic `<fieldset>` + `<input type="radio">` (HTML fallback)
- `CheckboxGroup` -- Semantic `<fieldset>` + `<input type="checkbox">` (HTML fallback)
- `Textarea` -- Chakra `Textarea`
- `DynamicFragment` -- `<input type="hidden">`

### Read-Only Field Components (1)
- `ReadOnly` -- `ReadOnlyText`

### Supporting Components
- `ReadOnlyText` -- Shared read-only text display
- `StatusMessage` -- Form status display
- `FormLoading` -- Loading state

### Helpers
- `FieldClassName()` -- Build CSS class name with error state
- `GetFieldDataTestId()` -- Build data-testid attribute
- `getFieldState()` -- Compute data-field-state value from error/required/readOnly
- `formatDateTime()` -- Format date string for display
- `DocumentLinksStrings` -- Default string literals for document links UI

## Code Example

```tsx
import { RulesEngineProvider, InjectedFieldProvider, Formosaic } from "@formosaic/core";
import { createChakraFieldRegistry } from "@formosaic/chakra";

const formConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    name: { type: "Textbox", label: "Name", required: true },
    role: { type: "Dropdown", label: "Role", options: [
      { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
      { value: "user", label: "User" },
    ]},
  },
  fieldOrder: ["name", "role"],
};

function App() {
  return (
    <RulesEngineProvider>
      <InjectedFieldProvider injectedFields={createChakraFieldRegistry()}>
        <Formosaic formConfig={formConfig} saveData={async (data) => data} />
      </InjectedFieldProvider>
    </RulesEngineProvider>
  );
}
```
